inputs.label: Average Purchase Value
inputs.businessContext: Average monetary value of each customer transaction.

businessContext_i18n.en: Average monetary value of each customer transaction.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Her müşteri işleminin ortalama parasal değeri.

inputs.label: Purchase Frequency
inputs.businessContext: Average number of purchases a customer makes per year.

businessContext_i18n.en: Average number of purchases a customer makes per year.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Bir müşterinin yılda yaptığı ortalama satın alma sayısı.
businessContext_i18n.de: Durchschnittliche Anzahl der Käufe eines Kunden pro Jahr.

inputs.label: Customer Lifespan
inputs.businessContext: Average duration a customer remains active (in years).

businessContext_i18n.en: Average duration a customer remains active (in years).
businessContext_i18n.tr: Bir müşterinin aktif kaldığı ortalama süre (yıl olarak).
businessContext_i18n.de: Durchschnittliche Dauer, die ein Kunde aktiv bleibt (in Jahren).

inputs.label: Gross Margin
inputs.businessContext: Gross margin percentage applied to revenue to reflect profit contribution.

businessContext_i18n.en: Gross margin percentage applied to revenue to reflect profit contribution.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Gelire uygulanan brüt kar marjı yüzdesi, kar katkısını yansıtır.
businessContext_i18n.de: Bruttomargenprozentsatz, angewendet auf den Umsatz, um den Gewinnbeitrag widerzuspiegeln.

suggestedActions: Review inputs and verify results against site standards.
